1082552829154389767.name: COMIC POP ART ACTION CASUAL SHIRT
1082552829154389767.description:
Turn up the energy with this white short-sleeve shirt covered in retro comic-book graphics — Ka-Pow!, BAM!, and BOOOOOOM bubbles in red, orange, and yellow with sharp black outlines.

Key features:
• All-over pop-art print with explosion clouds, starbursts, and action lines.
• Lightweight breathable poplin-style fabric for warm Nairobi days.
• Point collar and full button placket with discreet white buttons.
• Relaxed modern fit with slightly cuffed short sleeves.
• Statement piece for weekends, creative offices, and streetwear looks.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

1105070827338807633.name: TAN & WHITE PINSTRIPE FORMAL SHIRT
1105070827338807633.description:
A refined long-sleeve dress shirt in tan and white vertical pinstripes — smart enough for the boardroom, relaxed enough for rolled-cuff after-hours style.

Key features:
• Fine vertical stripe pattern with slimming, timeless appeal.
• Structured point collar that holds shape with or without a tie.
• Cotton or cotton-linen blend with natural drape and breathability.
• Curved shirttail hem for neat tucking or smart untucked wear.
• Polished white buttons on a full-length front placket.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

1111544751837321308.name: BLACK TRIBAL PANEL CASUAL SHIRT
1111544751837321308.description:
Contemporary black short-sleeve shirt with a bold vertical tribal geometric panel in high-contrast white — finished with a sleek mandarin collar and white buttons.

Key features:
• Asymmetrical tribal geometric inset for a culturally inspired look.
• Modern band collar alternative to classic spread collars.
• Lightweight breathable cotton-blend for all-day comfort.
• Straight hem designed for untucked casual wear.
• Pairs with chinos or denim for day-to-night versatility.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

1113022495441489805.name: SKY BLUE LINEN-BLEND CASUAL SHIRT
1113022495441489805.description:
A refreshing powder-blue casual shirt with visible linen-blend texture, rolled sleeves, and a soft relaxed drape — ideal for warm-weather smart-casual dressing.

Key features:
• Breathable linen-blend weave with natural slub character.
• Classic point collar and curved shirttail hem.
• Long sleeves with button cuffs — easily rolled for a laid-back look.
• Tonal buttons on a clean button-down front.
• Crisp sky-blue shade pairs with chinos, jeans, or shorts.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

1123577807051528923.name: MIDNIGHT & SAND PANEL MOTIF CASUAL SHIRT
1123577807051528923.description:
Vintage resort style meets modern tailoring in this black short-sleeve shirt with sand-beige paisley, geometric, and circular motifs arranged in structured panels.

Key features:
• Multi-paneled print blending paisley swirls, diamonds, and scroll borders.
• High-contrast black and tan palette for effortless pairing with denim.
• Lightweight cotton-rayon feel with soft warm-weather drape.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

1137440449687978922.name: BLACK & COGNAC DUO-TONE CASUAL SHIRT
1137440449687978922.description:

Key features:

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

12_Hottest_Men_s_Dress_Shirts_to_Wear_fo.name: CLASSIC WHITE LONG-SLEEVE DRESS SHIRT
12_Hottest_Men_s_Dress_Shirts_to_Wear_fo.description:
The foundation of every formal wardrobe — a crisp white long-sleeve dress shirt with a sharp spread collar, clean placket, and polished barrel cuffs.

Key features:
• Pure white colourway for weddings, interviews, and black-tie events.
• Structured collar designed to sit neatly under jackets and ties.
• Smooth wrinkle-resistant cotton blend for all-day sharpness.
• Barrel cuffs with single-button closure.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

146789269100262103.name: IMPASTO SUNSET LANDSCAPE ART SHIRT
146789269100262103.description:

Key features:
• High-definition 3D-effect landscape print with heavy brushstroke detail.
• Vibrant multi-tone sky transitioning from indigo to fiery sunset hues.
• Short sleeves with classic point collar and four-button partial placket.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

Pacific Palm shirt with oversized abstract tropical fronds in tan, mocha, black, and white — modern resort print on a relaxed short-sleeve body.

Key features:
• Large-scale abstract palm and geometric leaf print.
• Sophisticated earth-tone palette.
• Point collar and white button placket.
• Lightweight soft-drape resort fabric.
• QUEST GC-quality resort casual styling.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

STRIP_SHIRT.name: HERITAGE STRIPE CASUAL SHIRT
STRIP_SHIRT.description:
Heritage stripe casual shirt — balanced vertical bands on a comfortable button-down for easy everyday rotation.

Key features:
• Classic stripe pattern in heritage colours.
• Casual comfortable regular fit.
• Button-front with point collar.
• Versatile daywear essential.
• Pairs with jeans and sneakers.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

Striped_With_Daffodils_Slim_Fit_Shirts_-.name: RED DAFFODIL STRIPE SLIM SHIRT
Striped_With_Daffodils_Slim_Fit_Shirts_-.description:
Slim-fit red shirt with delicate daffodil floral accents woven into stripe bands — romantic formal-casual hybrid for spring events.

Key features:
• Unique daffodil floral detail within stripe pattern.
• Slim fit for a sharp modern profile.
• Red ground with contrasting stripe bands.
• Long-sleeve button-down construction.
• Spring wedding and garden party appropriate.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

Summer_Coconut_Tree_Print_Shirts_Men_s_H.name: COCONUT TREE VINTAGE HAWAIIAN SHIRT
Summer_Coconut_Tree_Print_Shirts_Men_s_H.description:
Vintage Hawaiian shirt with coconut palm silhouettes — retro beach print on a short-sleeve button-down for tropical nostalgia.

Key features:
• Coconut tree tropical vintage print.
• Classic Hawaiian short-sleeve cut.
• Breathable beach leisure fabric.
• Button-down with camp collar.
• Retro vacation and luau styling.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

Summer_Outfit_-_Amalfi_Set_-_Light_Blue_.name: AMALFI LIGHT BLUE SUMMER SHIRT
Summer_Outfit_-_Amalfi_Set_-_Light_Blue_.description:
Amalfi coast-inspired light blue summer shirt — Mediterranean resort colour in a breathable short-sleeve casual cut.

Key features:
• Coastal light blue summer tone.
• Part of the Amalfi resort collection.
• Breathable warm-weather fabric.
• Clean button-down casual styling.
• Italian Riviera holiday aesthetic.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

Summer_Short_Sleeve_Shirt_With_Stripes_A.name: STRIPE & PRINT LAPEL COLLAR SHIRT
Summer_Short_Sleeve_Shirt_With_Stripes_A.description:
Summer short-sleeve shirt mixing stripe and printed panels — lapel collar detail adds a refined twist to casual warm-weather wear.

Key features:
• Combined stripe and graphic print design.
• Lapel collar for elevated casual look.
• Short-sleeve summer construction.
• Lightweight breathable fabric.
• Dual-pattern shirt for style experimenters.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

The_Perfect_Minimal_Striped_Shirt.name: MINIMAL STRIPE FORMAL SHIRT
The_Perfect_Minimal_Striped_Shirt.description:
The perfect minimal striped shirt — fine understated stripes on a clean long-sleeve body for refined smart-casual dressing.

Key features:
• Minimal stripe scale for subtle sophistication.
• Clean uncluttered formal-casual design.
• Long-sleeve with crisp collar.
• Premium cotton with smooth finish.
• Capsule wardrobe stripe essential.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

Uiriuy_Mens_Casual_Collared_Short_Sleeve.name: DUSTY BLUE CORDUROY CASUAL SHIRT
Uiriuy_Mens_Casual_Collared_Short_Sleeve.description:
Dusty slate-blue corduroy shirt with fine vertical wale texture — camp collar, chest pocket, and rolled cuffs for tactile casual luxury.

Key features:
• Fine corduroy wale texture adds depth and warmth.
• Relaxed Cuban camp collar sits flat and open.
• Single left chest patch pocket.
• Fixed rolled-up short sleeve cuffs.
• Soft-touch fabric for smart-casual summer evenings.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

Uiriuy_Mens_Casual_Collared_Short_Sleeve.name: DUSTY BLUE CORDUROY CASUAL SHIRT — VARIANT
Uiriuy_Mens_Casual_Collared_Short_Sleeve.description:
Variant of our dusty blue corduroy camp-collar shirt — same fine wale texture and rolled cuffs in Prince Esquire casual collection.

Key features:
• Textured corduroy with subtle vertical rib.
• Camp collar for open-neck comfort.
• Contrasting white buttons on blue ground.
• Chest pocket and rolled short sleeves.
• Tactile alternative to flat cotton casual shirts.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

Vintage_Red___White_Floral_Hawaiian_Shir.name: VINTAGE RED HIBISCUS HAWAIIAN SHIRT
Vintage_Red___White_Floral_Hawaiian_Shir.description:
Deep red Hawaiian shirt with oversized cream hibiscus blooms and a subtle distressed vintage texture — classic tropical celebration style.

Key features:
• Large-scale cream hibiscus on rich red ground.
• Vintage distressed texture within floral areas.
• Spread collar and white button placket.
• Relaxed fit for beach parties and cruises.
• High-contrast tropical floral statement.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

ZEROYAA_Men_s_Hipster_Patchwork_Design_S.name: NAVY & TAN PATCHWORK PAISLEY SHIRT
ZEROYAA_Men_s_Hipster_Patchwork_Design_S.description:
ZEROYAA slim-fit patchwork shirt in navy and tan — paisley, diamond, and ornamental circles arranged in structured panels.

Key features:
• Intricate patchwork of paisley and geometric blocks.
• Navy and sandy tan high-contrast palette.
• Slim fit for a contemporary sharp silhouette.
• Point collar and light contrast buttons.
• Artistic casual piece for confident dressers.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

ZEROYAA_Men_s_Luxury_Gold_Prom_Design_Sl.name: ZEROYAA GOLD PROM SLIM FORMAL SHIRT
ZEROYAA_Men_s_Luxury_Gold_Prom_Design_Sl.description:
ZEROYAA luxury gold prom shirt — slim-fit long-sleeve with ornate gold monogram pattern on black for gala and prom-night presence.

Key features:
• Opulent gold prom design on dark ground.
• Slim fit tailored for youthful formal style.
• Long-sleeve with dress-shirt collar.
• Premium ZEROYAA luxury collection quality.
• Prom, gala, and red-carpet statement piece.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

all_the_men_s_fation_.name: MEN'S FASHION PRINT CASUAL SHIRT
all_the_men_s_fation_.description:
Contemporary men's fashion print shirt — trend-forward pattern on a casual button-down for style-conscious weekend wear.

Key features:
• Current fashion-forward print design.
• Casual button-down construction.
• Breathable fabric for daily wear.
• Versatile styling with denim or chinos.
• Affordable entry to statement casual shirts.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

best_formal_shirt.name: BEST IN CLASS WHITE DRESS SHIRT
best_formal_shirt.description:
Best-in-class white dress shirt — benchmark formal construction with crisp collar, precise stitching, and premium cotton blend.

Key features:
• Top-tier white dress-shirt quality.
• Precision collar and cuff construction.
• Smooth premium cotton-poly blend.
• Long-sleeve formal tailoring.
• The gold standard for suiting and tuxedos.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

camisa_masculina_de_manga_comprida_com_e.name: LONG-SLEEVE PRINTED DRESS SHIRT
camisa_masculina_de_manga_comprida_com_e.description:
Portuguese-style long-sleeve printed dress shirt (camisa masculina) — artistic print on formal long-sleeve construction.

Key features:
• Artistic all-over print on dress-shirt frame.
• Long-sleeve manga comprida formal cut.
• Point collar and button cuffs.
• Smooth woven fabric with print clarity.
• Formal-casual hybrid for creative professionals.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

chemises_de_qualit_.name: FRENCH QUALITY DRESS SHIRT
chemises_de_qualit_.description:
French quality dress shirt (chemise de qualité) — refined European craftsmanship in a crisp long-sleeve formal silhouette.

Key features:
• Premium French-quality shirt construction.
• Crisp formal fabric with excellent drape.
• Long-sleeve with classic collar stand.
• Quality stitching and button finishing.
• European formal standard for professionals.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

download__12_.name: TROPICAL PRINT CASUAL SHIRT
download__12_.description:
Tropical print casual shirt with vibrant holiday motifs — short-sleeve button-down for downloaded-from-summer-catalogue vacation style.

Key features:
• Bold tropical holiday print.
• Short-sleeve warm-weather cut.
• Camp or spread collar styling.
• Lightweight breathable fabric.
• Affordable vacation wardrobe addition.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

this_is_very_nice_shirt.name: PREMIUM SMART CASUAL SHIRT
this_is_very_nice_shirt.description:
A genuinely standout smart-casual shirt — quality fabric, clean tailoring, and versatile colour that earns its "very nice" reputation.

Key features:
• Premium fabric with refined hand-feel.
• Smart-casual tailoring for multiple occasions.
• Classic button-down with point collar.
• Long-sleeve construction with button cuffs.
• Customer-favourite versatile formal-casual piece.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

Keldros_-_Stilvolles_Freizeit-T-Shirt_-_.name: KELDROS DARK NAVY CASUAL SHIRT
Keldros_-_Stilvolles_Freizeit-T-Shirt_-_.description:
Keldros dark navy casual shirt — stylish Freizeit (leisure) piece in deep marine tone with relaxed European tailoring.

Key features:
• Deep dunkelmarine navy colour.
• Stylish casual Freizeit cut.
• Comfortable everyday fit.
• Classic collar and button front.
• German casual quality from Keldros.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.

link_below_____Classic_Navy_Striped_Shir.name: CLASSIC NAVY STRIPE SMART CASUAL SHIRT
link_below_____Classic_Navy_Striped_Shir.description:
Classic navy striped smart-casual shirt — essential vertical bands in navy and white for polished off-duty and office-friday style.

Key features:
• Navy and white vertical stripe pattern.
• Smart-casual essential for every wardrobe.
• Long-sleeve with buttoned cuffs.
• Crisp collar for tie or open-neck.
• Pairs with chinos and Prince Esquire blazers.

Available sizes M–3XL. Pair with Prince Esquire trousers or denim for a complete look.
